content: Java background jobs 2026: JobRunr (8.x, virtual threads, dashboard, auto-retry 10x with backoff, Postgres storage) vs db-scheduler (lightweight, persistent, transactional, cron, retries, no dashboard) vs Quartz (legacy, manual retries/thread mgmt, clustering complex). Quartz considered legacy choice; JobRunr/db-scheduler both use existing RDBMS. Postgres SKIP LOCKED polling remains a valid roll-your-own for small pilots where job state is domain data.
